prestazioni: Engine swap to L15B7 (1.5L turbocharged DOHC i-VTEC) with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2835 ball-bearing turbo, 267-degree camshafts, and HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 60mm titanium tips) for 280whp on E85 fuel, paired with a K-Tuned 4-2-1 stainless header and AEM Infinity 7 ECU for closed-loop boost control

Full Driveshaft Shop custom driveshafts with 300M steel CV joints and reinforced boots, mated to a KAAZ 1.5-way limited-slip differential (2.2 final drive) and Endless CC-R brake pads with DBA 5000 Series rotors (330mm front, 300mm rear) for aggressive deceleration

Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) with Swift springs, Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow), and Ultra Racing rear lower arm bars (3-point design), complemented by Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar and poly bushings for chassis rigidity
estetica: Modulo X-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (FRP construction) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (30mm overhang) and rear diffuser (25mm ground clearance), painted in Honda Championship White (NH-0) with matte black accents

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x7 +45 front, 17x8 +35 rear) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 tires (215/45R17 front, 235/40R17 rear), with custom Modulo X-branded center caps and Duraflex extended side skirts (50mm drop)

Recaro Sportster CS seats (Honda-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, suede) and NRG quick-release hub, plus a custom Modulo X shift knob (weighted, 80g) for the CVT-to-6MT conversion
